examiner_note: Đây là câu hỏi quen thuộc về phong cách sống. Giám khảo muốn nghe về thói quen ăn uống (diet), vận động (physical activities) và đôi khi là sức khỏe tinh thần (mental well-being). Hãy sử dụng các cụm từ như 'balanced diet', 'daily exercise routine', 'stress management' để xây dựng câu trả lời thuyết phục. Đừng quên nhắc đến sự kỷ luật (self-discipline) trong việc duy trì lối sống lành mạnh.

band7.text: I try my best to lead a healthy lifestyle by eating a balanced diet with plenty of vegetables and fruits. I also go jogging for about 30 minutes every morning to stay active. Additionally, I make sure to get at least 7 hours of sleep each night to recharge my energy.
band7.note: Trả lời mạch lạc, bao quát được cả ăn uống, vận động và giấc ngủ. Sử dụng tốt các từ vựng phổ thông (balanced diet, stay active, recharge energy).

band8.text: Maintaining my health is a top priority for me. I follow a strict fitness regime that includes a mix of cardio and strength training. In terms of nutrition, I try to avoid processed foods and focus on whole, nutrient-dense ingredients. I also believe that mental health is just as important, so I practice mindfulness to manage stress and keep a positive outlook on life.
band8.note: Sử dụng các cụm từ nâng cao (top priority, fitness regime, cardio, nutrient-dense, mindfulness, positive outlook). Cách dẫn đạt tự nhiên và chuyên nghiệp.

band9.text: I adopt a holistic approach to my well-being, which encompasses physical, nutritional, and mental health. I engage in high-intensity interval training to bolster my cardiovascular health while prioritizing a diet rich in antioxidants and lean proteins. Furthermore, I place great emphasis on psychological hygiene, utilizing techniques like transcendental meditation to mitigate the detrimental effects of a fast-paced lifestyle. For me, health isn't just the absence of illness; it's the optimization of one's physical and mental potential.
band9.note: Sử dụng vốn từ vựng cực kỳ học thuật và chuyên sâu (holistic approach, encompasses, high-intensity interval training, bolster, cardiovascular, antioxidants, psychological hygiene, transcendental meditation, mitigate, detrimental). Cách lập luận vô cùng tinh tế.

v.meaning: phương pháp tiếp cận toàn diện
v.example: A holistic approach to education considers the child's emotional and physical needs.
The festival encompasses a wide range of cultural activities.
New evidence helped to bolster the prosecution's case.
Regular swimming is excellent for maintaining cardiovascular health.
Berries are a great source of antioxidants that protect cells.

v.meaning: vệ sinh tâm lý (chăm sóc sức khỏe tinh thần)
v.example: Practicing gratitude is an essential part of psychological hygiene.
Taking breaks can mitigate the stress of a long workday.
Lack of sleep can have a detrimental effect on your productivity.
A balanced diet should include proteins, fats, and carbohydrates.
Maintaining a fitness routine requires a great deal of self-discipline.
Spinach is a nutrient-dense vegetable that is low in calories.
He follows a strict fitness regime to prepare for the marathon.

v.meaning: thực phẩm đã qua chế biến
v.example: Try to limit your intake of processed foods like sausages and chips.
Mindfulness helps people stay focused on the present moment.
Maintaining a positive outlook can help you overcome difficult times.
A sedentary lifestyle is linked to many health problems.
I felt exhausted after the intense physical excursion of the hike.
Regular exercise can help boost your metabolism.
Eating vitamin C helps strengthen your immune system.
Yoga provides a sense of physical and mental well-being.
Long-distance runners need a lot of stamina.
The training is a grueling test of physical endurance.

v.meaning: sự cung cấp nước (cho cơ thể)
v.example: Proper hydration is essential when exercising in the heat.
She is counting her calories to lose some weight.
Swimming and cycling are great forms of aerobic exercise.

v.meaning: bài tập kị khí (như nâng tạ)
v.example: Sprinting is an example of anaerobic exercise.

v.meaning: độ săn chắc của cơ bắp
v.example: Pilates is very effective for improving muscle tone.
Stretching exercises help increase your flexibility.
She is full of vitality even at the age of eighty.
A healthy diet and regular exercise are key to longevity.
The company has a new wellness program for its employees.

v.meaning: kiểm tra sức khỏe tổng quát
v.example: It's important to go for an annual medical check-up.
Vaccination is a vital tool for disease prevention.
Meditation can help reduce anxiety and improve focus.
Yoga and deep breathing are effective stress management techniques.
Cutting down on your sugar intake can lower your risk of diabetes.
Many people prefer to buy organic vegetables to avoid pesticides.
Farmers use pesticides to protect their crops from insects.
Some people take vitamin supplements to improve their health.
Fruits and vegetables are packed with essential nutrients.
Whole grains are a good source of dietary fiber.
Meat, fish, and beans are rich in protein.
High cholesterol levels can lead to heart disease.
Exercise helps to maintain a healthy blood pressure.
Obesity is a major health crisis in many developed countries.
Being an early bird allows me to exercise before work.
As a night owl, I find it hard to wake up for morning gym sessions.
A short nap can help you recharge your batteries.
It took her weeks to get back to health after the surgery.
Eating well is the way to go; remember, prevention is better than cure.
